description: Boast about your amazing Black Friday deals with this unique black friday email template. Share your discount details, product offerings and your app or website where customers can peruse their options. Customize this free email template with all of your on-brand colors and icons so customers can easily recognize your business. Don’t miss out on promoting one of the biggest shopping days of the year - start designing now!

designer.description: I'm a Product Designer passionate about creating meaningful, relevant and inclusive solutions for people.
